label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
iteration_disclosure: V1 remains a no-survivor under its zero-breach-increase rule. V2 locks the V1 row with the largest smaller normal/adverse pass-rate gain and tests a predeclared 0.5 percentage-point individual breach budget. No V1 candidate was evaluated on 2023.
development_replay_rule: The one locked candidate must reproduce strict normal and adverse pass-rate improvements and keep every daily/max breach-rate increase within 0.5 percentage points.
validation_open_rule: Only a reproduced development survivor may open 2023 once. The same pass-improvement and 0.5 pp breach-budget rule applies versus the 2023 control.
sealed_open_rule: Only a 2023 survivor may open 2024-2025 once without edits.
